title: Add zero-dep .mjs JSON/escape helper + Git-Bash launcher pattern with node-absent bash fallback
description: The safe seam for epic 81e: one reusable zero-dep .mjs owning JSON-string escaping (the f9_json_string job) + additionalContext envelope builders, mirroring irreversible-gate.mjs. Keep bash f9_json_string as node-absent fallback. Supersedes the-5-to-9-nnn.
acceptance_criteria: New hooks/*.mjs helper exports a JSON-string escaper + envelope builder(s) with node --test coverage (quotes, backslash, newline, tab, empty) that JSON.parse round-trips; a thin Git-Bash launcher pattern (execs node, falls back to bash f9_json_string when node absent, fail-closed) is reusable; no hook rewired yet. gate-test.sh 90/90, smoke-shift.sh GREEN, validate-plugin.sh GREEN with AND without node on PATH. No node_modules, no build step.

title: Fresh-machine bootstrap: prerequisites preflight + zero-context install + beads-from-JSONL init
acceptance_criteria: On a freshly-cloned repo on a clean machine with only claude+bd+node+git+pnpm: (a) a documented one-command install/launch brings the plugin + Card Room crew live (/clock-in works); (b) a SessionStart preflight checks for claude/bd/node/git/pnpm and warns clearly on any missing (never fails silent); (c) the beads backlog auto-initializes from the committed .beads/issues.jsonl (bd init + import) so 'bd ready' works with no manual steps; (d) driver/ devDeps install or are bundled; (e) ZERO reliance on dev-machine-local context — all project context comes from the repo (README/AGENTS/CLAUDE) + beads.
close_reason: Fresh-machine bootstrap: SessionStart preflight (claude/bd/node/git/pnpm, fail-open) + idempotent auto beads-init from .beads/issues.jsonl (guard on .beads/embeddeddolt) + docs/INSTALL.md. Card Room shift: Dealer implemented (fixed bd-doctor-exits-0-with-no-DB), independently verified PASS 0.95 by the Floor Auditor; gate GREEN, repo DB untouched.

title: Migrate fragile text/JSON logic from bash to zero-dep Node (.mjs), gate first
acceptance_criteria: Logic-heavy hooks run as zero-dep .mjs behind Git-Bash launchers; gate-test.sh stays 90/90 and smoke-shift.sh GREEN at every step; node documented+preflighted as a hard requirement; the irreversible gate FAILS CLOSED when node is absent; orchestration scripts stay bash. No build step, no node_modules.

title: v1: plugin core — crew, loop, gate, beads memory
acceptance_criteria: validate-plugin.sh exits 0; 4 commands + 7 agents present and frontmatter-valid; both run engines (/clock-in + night-shift.sh) present; irreversible gate blocks a sample force-push; portable AGENTS.md core + codex/cursor manifests present.

title: Make node a documented + preflighted HARD requirement and confirm the irreversible gate FAILS CLOSED when node is absent
description: Epic acceptance requires node documented+preflighted as hard requirement and the gate failing closed without node. Upgrade preflight messaging + docs; add explicit fail-closed assertion.
acceptance_criteria: node 18+ documented as a hard requirement in docs/INSTALL.md + agent guides; preflight surfaces a clear required-tool message when node missing (still fail-open for the session, worded as required); a test asserts the irreversible gate still DENIES corpus deny cases with node forced absent (fail-closed via bash fallback, never silent-allow). validate-plugin.sh GREEN with and without node; no node_modules.

title: Port shift-loop.sh block/reason JSON envelope assembly to the .mjs helper behind a launcher with bash fallback (keep loop control flow in bash)
description: Only the fragile part — escaping the reason string and printing {decision:block,reason}— routes through child 1's helper. Ralph control flow (counter, cap, no-progress) STAYS bash.
acceptance_criteria: shift-loop.sh emits its Stop-decision JSON (decision:block + escaped reason, plus no-op/allow-stop paths) via the .mjs helper when node present, bash fallback when absent; counter/cap/backlog-drained/no-progress branches behaviorally unchanged. smoke-shift.sh GREEN, gate-test.sh 90/90, validate-plugin.sh GREEN with and without node.

title: Port user-prompt-submit.sh (prompt extraction + trigger match + additionalContext envelope) to the .mjs helper behind a launcher with bash fallback
description: Same fragile JSON-in/JSON-out shape the gate already solved in node. Reuse child 1's helper for payload parse + envelope; keep bash trigger-match + fallback for node-absent. Independent of the session-start port.
acceptance_criteria: user-prompt-submit.sh extracts the prompt and emits its UserPromptSubmit additionalContext JSON via the .mjs helper when node present, bash fallback when absent; trigger detection + active/inactive note selection unchanged; JSON parses for adversarial notes; always exits 0. gate-test.sh 90/90, smoke-shift.sh GREEN, validate-plugin.sh GREEN with and without node.

title: Port session-start.sh JSON assembly (preflight + frontmatter read + additionalContext envelope) to the .mjs helper behind a launcher with bash fallback
description: session-start.sh is the heaviest text/JSON assembler. Move escaping + envelope construction into the shared .mjs (child 1), bash path as node-absent fallback. Retires bead-nnn's empty-PATH risk at its real home.
acceptance_criteria: session-start.sh emits its SessionStart additionalContext JSON via the .mjs helper when node present, via bash f9_json_string fallback when absent; valid JSON for empty/normal/quote/backslash/tab/newline notes; always exits 0 (fail-open) in both paths. gate-test.sh 90/90, smoke-shift.sh GREEN, validate-plugin.sh GREEN with and without node.

title: Driver realExec: close stdin so codex exec / stdin-reading tools don't hang
acceptance_criteria: 1) driver/src/exec.ts realExec spawns child processes with stdin closed/ignored (stdio ['ignore','pipe','pipe']) so tools that read stdin (codex exec, cat) don't hang; 2) a node:test in driver/test exercises realExec against real benign commands and asserts it captures stdout + exit 0 WITHOUT hanging, including a stdin-reading command (e.g. cat with no args) that completes via EOF; 3) from driver/: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test pass and bash tests/validate-plugin.sh exits 0
close_reason: realExec closes stdin (stdio ['ignore','pipe','pipe']); independently verified PASS 0.97 by the Floor Auditor — stdin-reading tools no longer hang, all ExecFn callers pass data as args (safe), 68 driver tests + validate-plugin.sh green.

title: Driver CLI: --help usage + clear unknown-backend error
acceptance_criteria: 1) 'npx tsx driver/src/main.ts --help' prints usage listing flags (--backend claude|codex|api, --goal, --budget-usd) and exits 0; 2) an unknown --backend prints a clear one-line error naming the valid backends and exits nonzero; 3) a node:test in driver/test covers the new behavior; 4) from driver/: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test all pass, and bash tests/validate-plugin.sh exits 0
close_reason: TDD by the Line Cook; independently verified PASS 0.98 by the Health Inspector: --help exit 0 with all flags, unknown --backend one-line error + nonzero exit, valid-run banner intact, 65 driver tests + validate-plugin.sh green.

title: Prove a real end-to-end shift on a sample repo + capture the report
acceptance_criteria: On a throwaway sample repo, the crew claims a bead, implements TDD, greens the gate, the Floor Auditor verifies, the bead closes, and /clock-out prints a report.
notes: Mechanical proof done: tests/smoke-shift.sh drives setup→Stop-loop→scripted-cook-drains-backlog→clock-out. Remaining: a live LLM-driven crew shift with the plugin installed.

title: v0.2: harden the shift + prove a real end-to-end run
acceptance_criteria: A full shift runs on a sample repo (claim→implement→test→verify→close) and emits a shift report; gate + loop covered by an automated smoke test in CI; shellcheck clean and blocking.

title: Test gate validate-plugin.sh + CI; behavioral verification green
Hooks: SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit/PreToolUse gate/Stop loop/PreCompact
Scripts: setup/clock-out/guardrail-scan/night-shift fresh-process engine
Four commands + running-the-shift / shift-memory-beads skills
Seven role-agents with crisp charters, model-right-sized
Simplify/consolidate the superseded bash JSON-escape fallbacks; confirm orchestration scripts stay bash
description: Cleanup last, after parity proven. Dedupe inline escaper in irreversible-gate.sh against common.sh; comment retained bash paths as node-absent fallback of record; assert night-shift/setup-shift/clock-out/guardrail-scan stay bash.
acceptance_criteria: Duplicated/dead bash JSON-escape branches consolidated to a single fallback source (irreversible-gate.sh references it, not re-inlined); each retained bash path commented as node-absent fallback; the four orchestration scripts remain bash (confirmed). No behavior change: gate-test.sh 90/90, smoke-shift.sh GREEN, validate-plugin.sh GREEN with and without node. No node_modules, no build step.

title: phase-2: cross-tool runtimes + dashboard
acceptance_criteria: Cross-tool runtimes and the read-only dashboard graduate from documented-path to functional, without weakening the gate or no-clobber guarantees.

title: Functional Codex CLI runtime (port hook + subagent wiring)
Fixture-test the irreversible gate + make shellcheck blocking
acceptance_criteria: irreversible-gate.sh has a fixture-driven unit test (deny/allow corpus) and the deny-list is reviewed for coverage gaps; shellcheck is made blocking.

title: CI smoke test for the loop + gate
acceptance_criteria: CI runs a smoke test driving setup-shift → shift-loop (Stop hook) → clock-out and asserts block/allow + no-clobber behavior.

title: Harden f9_json_string under degenerate empty PATH (flagged in icn audit)
acceptance_criteria: Under a degenerate empty PATH (no coreutils: awk/jq absent), f9_json_string still emits valid JSON additionalContext (or omits it cleanly). SessionStart already exits 0 (fail-open); only the JSON can be malformed in that degenerate case.
close_reason: Hardened f9_json_string no-jq fallback to pure bash builtins; survives empty PATH. Verified by execution (Floor Auditor 0.97), full gate GREEN. Committed.

title: MCP server packaging + multi-repo swarms / federation
Functional Cursor runtime
Live TUI dashboard (read-only view over beads/state)
